title: Meno's Vanilla ModPack
description: Improved assembly of ModdyChat from MineShield 3.
body:
**Meno's Vanilla ModPack**

Improved assembly of ModdyChat from MineShield 3.
~~Украденная~~ Улучшенная сборка Моддичата с Майншилда 3.

Модлист:
- BetterF3
- Better Ping Display
- Debugify
- Fog Looks Good Now
- ImmediatelyFast
- InvMove
- More Culling Extra
- No Chat Reports
- Presence Footsteps
- Remove Reloading Screen
- Skin Shuffle
- Zoomify
- Animatica
- Better Statistics Screen
- Bobby
- Chat Heads
- Chat Patches
- Cloth Config API
- Continuity
- Dynamic FPS
- Emotecraft
- [ETF] Entity Texture Features
- Entity Culling
- Fabric API
- Fabric Language Kotlin
- FerriteCore
- Find - Search For Items
- Indium
- Iris Shaders
- Language Reload
- Litematica
- Lithium
- MaLiLib
- Memory Leak Fix
- ModernFix
- Mod Menu
- More Culling
- M.R.U
- Ok Boomer
- oωo (owo-lib)
- Puzzle
- Reese's Sodium Options
- ReplayMod
- Sodium Extra
- Sodium
- Stendhal
- Simple Voice Chat
- YetAnotherConfigLib
